excerpts:
Section Title: The New Zuck > Charting Mark Zuckerberg's path toward MAGA
Content:
He recently conspicuously pivoted toward MAGA, meeting quietly with incoming Trump officials, and complaining about the Biden administration on Joe Rogan’s podcast. This week, we trace the story of the Meta CEO, and investigate what his new persona means for the four billion people who use his products.

title: Mark Zuckerberg is creating an… - The Claire Byrne Show - Apple Podcasts
excerpts:
Section Title: Mark Zuckerberg is creating an AI version of himself
Content:
[The Claire Byrne Show](https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/the-claire-byrne-show/id1496321249)
Play
Mark Zuckerberg is creating an AI version of himself so that staff can talk to him. The AI clone of Zuckerberg, Meta’s founder and chief executive, is being trained on his mannerisms and tone as well as his public statements and thoughts on company strategy.  Why, why and how? Newstalk's Technology Correspondent Jess Kelly explains all.

We're supposed to be buried there forever, right? Right?? Answers this week from writer David Sloane, who grew up in a cemetery and spent his adult life studying them. The surprising history of the place we go where we die and an answer to what happens when it runs out of money.

title: The Tim Ferriss Show Transcripts: Mark Zuckerberg on Long-Term Strategy, Business and Parenting Principles, Personal Energy Management, Building the Metaverse, Seeking Awe, the Role of Religion, Solving Deep Technical Challenges (e.g., AR), and More (#582) - The Blog of Author Tim Ferriss
excerpts:
Section Title: The Tim Ferriss Show Transcripts: Mark Zuckerberg on Long-Term Strategy, Business and Parenting P...
Content:
Mark is also the co-founder and co-CEO of the [Chan Zuckerberg Initiative](https://chanzuckerberg.com/) with his wife Priscilla, which is leveraging technology to help solve some of the world’s toughest challenges—including supporting the science and technology that will make it possible to cure, prevent, or manage all diseases by the end of the twenty-first century.
Mark studied computer science at Harvard University before moving to Palo Alto, California, in 2004.
Transcripts may contain a few typos. With many episodes lasting 2+ hours, it can be difficult to catch minor errors. Enjoy!

title: Zuckerberg's Secret Plan To WIN The AI Race | Meta AI ... - YouTube
excerpts:
Section Title: Zuckerberg's Secret Plan To WIN The AI Race | Meta AI Chief Reveals Future > Comments 230
Content:
3.5K Likes 149,703 Views Feb 26 2026 In this episode, we sit down with Alex Wang, former founder of Scale AI and now Chief AI Officer at Meta, to understand what Meta Superintelligence Labs is actually building. We talk about how Meta is designing its AI organisation from scratch, focusing on research depth, talent density, and long-term scientific foundations instead of short-term wins. We then understand how Meta balances frontier research with real-world products, and how models, infrastructure, and consumer applications all work together. They focus then shifts to AI agents, including wearables like the Ray-Ban Meta glasses. Finally, we talk about leadership, what it is like working with Mark Zuckerberg. So if you’re someone even remotely interested in AI, this conversation has it all. 00:00 - Highlights 00:57 - Introduction 01:46 - What is Meta Super Intelligence Labs?
